purpose: User-side pre-onboarding checklist for IonQ Forte 1 access via AWS Braket. NO action taken by agent; user must execute each step on own authorization.

user_actions_required.name: AWS account
user_actions_required.detail: Create or use existing AWS account; institutional preferred for billing isolation
user_actions_required.prereq: Credit card, email, phone for verification

user_actions_required.name: IAM permissions
user_actions_required.detail: Attach AmazonBraketFullAccess policy to user/role; or create least-privilege Braket-only policy

user_actions_required.name: Enable Braket service
user_actions_required.detail: Braket console -> Permissions tab -> 'Enable Amazon Braket'; auto-creates S3 bucket amazon-braket-us-east-1-<acct-id> for results

user_actions_required.name: Billing alarm
user_actions_required.detail: CloudWatch -> Billing alarm -> threshold $50 USD; SNS notify on breach
user_actions_required.honest_c3_note: Soft cap only; AWS does not auto-stop tasks. Hard limit requires Service Quotas + custom Lambda.

user_actions_required.name: Local SDK or Notebook
user_actions_required.detail: Option A: pip install amazon-braket-sdk in local Python 3.9+ environment. Option B: use AWS-side Braket Notebook (Jupyter, preinstalled) to avoid local Python install. NOTE: anima HEXA-only policy means user runs Python in separate environment, not in anima repo.

user_actions_required.name: Forte 1 device ARN verification
user_actions_required.detail: Braket console -> Devices -> filter 'IonQ' -> identify Forte 1 entry -> copy exact ARN string. Predicted: arn:aws:braket:us-east-1::device/qpu/ionq/Forte-1 (or Forte-Enterprise-1)
user_actions_required.verification_test: 5-shot Bell state on simulator first ($0), then 5-shot Bell on Forte 1 ($0.30 + 5*$0.08 = $0.70)

user_actions_required.name: Korea-specific (if applicable)
user_actions_required.detail: If user in Korea, no special config; ap-northeast-2 Braket SDK calls succeed; QPU result returns from us-east-1 S3. Cross-border data transfer policy review per institution.

agent_constraint: raw#9 hexa-only + raw#10 honest C3: agent does NOT submit AWS forms, does NOT create accounts, does NOT place orders. All steps are user-executed.
